name: Civil Construction
description: Civil construction services — buildings, structures, masonry, concrete, foundations. Used as summary head on Work Orders for civil scope; detailed quantities measured at BOQ row level.

name: Plumbing Works
description: Plumbing services — pipes, fittings, fixtures, drainage, water supply. Internal and external plumbing scope.

name: Electrical Works
description: Electrical services — wiring, conduits, switchgear, lighting, panels, earthing. Internal and external electrical scope.

name: Finishing Works
description: Finishing services — plastering, painting, flooring, tiling, false ceiling, doors, windows. Final-stage interior works.

name: External Works
description: External works — landscaping, paving, compound walls, drainage, road works, site development.

name: Annual Maintenance Contract
description: Annual Maintenance Contracts — recurring servicing of equipment, buildings, infrastructure. Lift, generator, HVAC, fire safety, etc.

name: Manpower Services
description: Manpower contracts — housekeeping, security, gardening, pest control, hostel staff, and other contract labour.

name: Transportation Services
description: Transport services — bus, vehicle hire, freight, material movement, staff/student transport contracts.

name: IT Services
description: IT services — software development, system maintenance, network setup, IT support, data services.

name: Equipment Hire
description: Equipment hire — machinery, tools, scaffolding, vehicle hire on day or job basis. Distinct from purchase of fixed assets.

name: Repair And Maintenance
description: One-off repair and maintenance work — distinct from AMC. Reactive fixes, breakdown repairs, refurbishment.

name: Other Services
description: Catch-all for service contracts that do not fit any specific category. Use sparingly — prefer adding a specific item when a category is recurring.
